cryptoMap.title: Crypto Navigator
cryptoMap.intro: Find merchants, ATMs and financial services that transact in crypto near you — switch to satellite or 3D terrain, and route there from your location or any address.
cryptoMap.noOrigin: Set your location first (📍 or search an address)
cryptoMap.pickDestination: Pick a destination on the map
cryptoMap.clickToDrop: または地図をクリックしてピンを置く
cryptoMap.noTransit: ここでは公共交通の経路がありません
cryptoMap.dataNote: Places from OpenStreetMap contributors (crypto-payment tags); routing by OSRM; geocoding by Nominatim. Coverage is community-sourced and skewed toward Bitcoin/Lightning.
cryptoMap.arrived: 目的地に到着しました
cryptoMap.permissionDenied: 位置情報がブロックされています。ブラウザの設定で有効にしてください。
